rulings.Case Title: NORMA ANN MULLIGAN VS. LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 27, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT EDWARD SAVINO's MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT Defendant's Motion to Strike Punitive Damages as to Defendant Edward Savino is DENIED. Complaint sufficiently alleges malice, oppression and/or fruaud as to Defendant Savino to sustain a request for punitive damages at the pleading stage. Defendant's Renewed Motion to Strike Punitive Damages is STRICKEN. A CCP 1008(b) is not appropriate, and even if it was there are still sufficient facts to support a request for punitive damages. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 2951 SAN BRUNO, LLC VS. JANE DOE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 27, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANT MARIA GOMEZ's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. First Amended Complaint alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. Allegations in the complaint, as well as exhibits provided, are taken as true for the purposes of ruling on the demurrer. = (501/REQ)
